candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate; matches total sales/revenue concept.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: This is a cost line, not revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue row.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: This is a direct cost component, but only a labor subcomponent rather than full cost of sales/cost of revenue.

final_choice.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss the fuller direct operating cost row. Chose 'Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental' from the sheet preview because it best represents total direct costs of generating rental income, whereas 'Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue' is only a subcomponent. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Appears to be direct property/rental operating cost, closer to COGS than SG&A.
Could be overhead, but preview is empty and less specific than Administrative Expenses.
Best explicit overhead/administrative expense bucket; matches SG&A concept.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is a component within SG&A, but should not be added if broader Administrative Expenses row is selected to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but appears embedded within SG&A/admin bucket; avoid double counting if Administrative Expenses is used.
Balance sheet equity reserve, not an income statement overhead expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit overhead bucket 'Administrative Expenses' only, per SG&A hierarchy. Excluded direct property operating expenses and excluded subcomponents already likely embedded in administrative expenses to avoid double counting.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the provided income statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related expense but narrower/specific lease component only.
Finance cost line but not specifically interest; acceptable only as weaker fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest, not preferred over main reported interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority order favors the main reported interest expense line, then a narrower lease-interest line, then broader finance expense as fallback if needed.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.
Best match for parent/common shareholders' equity and excludes minority interest given separate NCI lines are present.
This is minority interest, not book equity attributable to owners.
Includes minority interest and would risk double counting with MIB.
Balancing row, not a substantive equity measure.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/shareholder equity line because minority interest is reported separately.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not the balance sheet minority interest stock.
Best balance sheet match for minority/non-controlling interests.
Also a valid balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback if the other label is missing in some years.
Income statement allocation, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority options; these pair cleanly with BE='Shareholders' Equity - Total' without double counting.
